chart.title: Detect sudden traffic spikes or drops relative to recent behavior.

search.query: index=$index$ | timechart span=1h count AS events | eventstats avg(events) AS baseline stdev(events) AS sd | eval anomaly=if(events > baseline + (2*sd) OR events < baseline - (2*sd), 1, 0)

chart.title: Detect short-term error explosions, even if volume is normal.

search.query: `ops_base_search($index$)` | timechart span=15m sum(is_error) AS errors count AS total | eval error_rate = (errors / total) * 100 | eventstats avg(error_rate) AS avg_error | eval spike = if(error_rate > avg_error * 1.5 AND error_rate > 5, 1, 0)

table.title: Give operators exact timestamps where anomalies occurred.

search.query: `ops_base_search($index$)` | timechart span=15m sum(is_error) AS errors count AS total | eval error_rate = round((errors / total) * 100, 2) | eventstats avg(error_rate) AS avg_error stdev(error_rate) AS sd | eval anomaly = if(error_rate > avg_error + (2*sd), "YES", "NO") | where anomaly="YES" | table _time error_rate avg_error | sort - error_rate
